overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a stormy lakeside fishing village at dusk. The character walks along dirt paths, encounters a combat scene with drowned bodies, crosses a wooden dock, and wades into the water while surveying the moody environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside dirt path through grassy wetlands

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the lakeside path toward a distant tree and fishing hut

notable_agents.action: villager walking ahead on the path carrying a wooden object

entered.detail: calm lake water reflecting the stormy sky with distant forested shoreline
massive gnarled oak tree with thick trunk and spreading branches
narrow winding dirt trail along the water's edge with patches of grass
rustic wooden house with thatched roof on the shoreline

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path beside a calm lake under stormy skies. The path leads toward a massive ancient tree and a distant fishing hut, with a villager visible walking ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside shore with combat aftermath and drowned bodies

events.description: Geralt throws a bomb or casts a sign at a creature in the shallow water
dead bodies of drowned victims become visible on the sandy shore

agents.ego_description: engaging a threat in the water with a ranged attack, then walking past the bodies of drowned victims on the shore

notable_agents.action: drowned corpse lying face down in the shallow water near the shore

entered.detail: bodies of victims in dark clothing washed up on the sandy shore
narrow stream flowing into the lake with wooden plank crossing
simple wooden planks spanning the small creek

segments.scene_description: Geralt engages a threat in the water and passes by the bodies of drowned victims on the shore. He approaches a small creek with a wooden plank bridge, while the fishing hut grows larger in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: fishing village approach with wooden structures and equipment

events.description: Geralt stops to look at the creek, then begins running toward the fishing hut

agents.ego_description: pausing to examine a small creek, then running along the shore toward the wooden fishing hut

notable_agents.action: villager carrying a wooden crate walking along the shoreline

entered.detail: small wooden fishing boat pulled up on the sand beside the hut
stacked barrels and sacks outside the fishing hut
rickety wooden pier extending over the water with rope railings
sandy beach area transitioning from the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Geralt pauses to inspect a creek, then runs toward a fishing hut, passing a villager carrying cargo. The scene shifts to a sandy shore with a beached rowboat and wooden dock coming into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock extending over the lake water

events.description: Geralt steps onto the wooden dock and crosses over the water

agents.ego_description: walking across the rickety wooden dock, passing fishing equipment and nets

entered.detail: coiled ropes and fishing nets hanging on the dock railing
far shore with trees and distant buildings across the lake

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses a narrow wooden dock extending over the lake, passing fishing nets and ropes. The fishing hut falls behind as he moves toward the far end of the pier with views of the distant shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach and shallow water with panoramic lake views

events.description: Geralt walks into the shallow water and stops to look around
camera pans to reveal panoramic view of the lake, distant village smoke, and stormy sky

agents.ego_description: wading into the lake water and turning to survey the shoreline and stormy sky

entered.detail: smoke rising from chimneys in the distant settlement across the lake
small forested island in the middle of the lake

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the dock and wades into the shallow water, then turns to pan the camera across the lake. The view reveals distant village smoke, a forested island, and the dramatic storm clouds above the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stormy lakeside path that gradually transitions into a wide, panoramic view of a moody coastal village. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path toward a massive ancient tree and a distant fishing hut under heavy skies. As he engages a threat in the water and passes the bodies of drowned victims, the camera follows him across a small plank bridge and past a villager carrying cargo. The scene then shifts toward a sandy shore with a beached rowboat before the camera tracks Geralt across a narrow wooden dock lined with fishing nets and ropes. Finally, he wades into the shallow water and pans across the lake to reveal distant village smoke, a forested island, and dramatic storm clouds looming over the horizon.
